sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Tank Piloting (Vehicle Section)
special_mechanics.description: Game features dual gameplay modes - on-foot platforming as Jason and vehicle-based tank (SOPHIA) sections with distinct mechanics

special_mechanics.name: Tank Power-ups
special_mechanics.description: Tank can acquire various upgrades including Hyper, Crusher, Gun Power enhancements, and others affecting tank movement and combat capability

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative. No specific movement physics values (speeds, acceleration, gravity, jump parameters) are documented in available sources. Sources provide game overview, development information, and feature descriptions but lack numerical physics parameters. Tank-focused platformer with distinct on-foot and vehicle mechanics.
